---
title: Distributed Time, Conservative Parallel Logic Simulation on GPUs
author:
- Bo Wang
- Yuhao Zhu
- Yangdong Deng
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/dac10.pdf
talk_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/dac10-slides.pdf
journ: DAC
year: 2010
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 1
---
